programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Right Up Your Alley
programme.desc: As you found your way to our sophisticated TV channel, these music videos should hopefully satisfy your need for cool new Metal- & Rock content. Enjoy and let your friends know! Remember, we’re in this together.

programme.title: Metal Detector
programme.desc: Look no further! This is the right place for everything heavy. Your quest has ended so, lean back, turn up that sound system to a solid 11 and enjoy the ride. You have been warned…

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Ein legendärer Auftritt einer Hardrock-Legende in Hamburg! Diese Aufnahme vereint frisches Material mit zeitlosen Klassikern. Eine musikalische Reise durch mehr als dreißig Jahre Rockgeschichte, die pure Energie und Nostalgie verspricht.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Giorgione a casa tua
programme.desc: Monte Faito - Giorgione a Monte Faito a casa dei suoi fans per cucinare insieme ricette tradizionali si', ma con il suo tocco laido e corrotto.

programme.title: Questa terra e' la mia terra S14
programme.desc: Scarpariello - pollo e peperoni - In questa nuova serie Peppe Guida ospita nella sua tenuta di Montechiaro, alcuni importanti produttori di vino. Un modo per far incontrare una cucina semplice ma raffinatissima con alcuni grandi vini

programme.title: Lodo e Lulu'
programme.desc: Secondi di carne - Lodovico Tamburi e Ludovica Gargari in ogni episodio preparano ricette semplici e gustose per ogni occasione e per tutti i palati.

programme.title: Nilu vista mare
programme.desc: Le ricette di Nilufar per affrontare il caldo estivo. Semplici, veloci ma soprattutto gustose, ideali per un pranzo in riva al mare o uno spuntino in compagnia.

programme.title: Beker on tour Collio
programme.desc: Ravioli di carne - Fabrizio Nonis, El Beker, il vostro macellaio di fiducia, e griller apposionato, in un delizioso viaggio alla scoperta di cotture, tagli e succose ricette da realizzare al BBQ

programme.title: Parola di chef S10
programme.desc: Marco Sciarrino - Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficolta', aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Il vino in pillole
programme.desc: I grandi vini spiegati da Giuseppe Carrus. I segreti per apprezzarne al meglio le caratteristiche organolettiche e i migliori abbinamenti

programme.title: Il gusto di Igles
programme.desc: S10 - La cucina circolare di Igles Corelli è una cucina zero sprechi. Ricette e consigli pratici per una sfruttare al massimo e senza sprechi gli ingredienti.

programme.title: North Island's Waterfalls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The North Island region of New Zealand is home to several stunning waterfalls, from tall streams that snake over towering cliffsides to short yet wide plunges of cascading waters.

programme.title: Relaxing Tide: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Relaxing in a Caribbean paradise by the lighthouse on the Dominican Republic's Bayahibe Beach.

programme.title: Fly Over the French Alps
programme.desc: Tour the French Alps from a bird's perspective while enjoying a relaxing soundtrack.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Misty Rustic Cabin: Quebec
programme.desc: On a rainy day, escape to a rustic and cozy cabin nestled at the foot of the mountains of the Stoneham Ski Resort.

programme.title: The California Coast
programme.desc: Calm your nerves and relax your senses with this ultra relaxing, super high resolution visual journey along the beautiful California Coast, from Redwood State Park at the northern tip, all the way down to San Diego; several years of filming at locations around California have made this video possible.

programme.title: New Chums Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: New Chums Beach offers a unique and idyllic coastal experience, combining natural beauty, tranquility, and seclusion; it's the perfect backdrop for nature lovers seeking the peaceful and serene with tranquil ocean views.

programme.title: Nassau Marina: Bahamas
programme.desc: Experiencing the tranquil waters of a laid-back marina tucked away in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Beach of Australia
programme.desc: Australia's rugged beauty.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 1
programme.desc: The sights and sounds of Big Sur, Calif.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: East Bali
programme.desc: A serene soundtrack amidst a journey to spectacular beaches in Bali.

programme.title: Nature Relaxation Journey Part 3
programme.desc: A colorful journey of dazzling different 5-10 minute sequences from places like Fiji, New Zealand, Patagonia, Everest, Hawaii, Canada, California, Oregon and more; an immensely relaxing and inspiring journey into the depths and wonders of nature.

programme.title: Above the Spanish Islands
programme.desc: Sweeping viewers on an aerial voyage over Mallorca and the Canary Islands.

programme.title: America From Above
programme.desc: Part one of a new series of ambient drone films for relaxation, America From Above is a spectacular yet ultra-soothing 1-hour long natural journey that sweeps viewers gently above America's vistas. You'll begin the farmlands of Iowa, soaring west through the Rocky Mountains of Colorado, then on to Utah's iconic red rock landscapes and finally ending on the West Coast with a familiar voyage over Big Sur and then back to San Diego just in time for sunset.

programme.title: Cadlao Lagoon: Philippines
programme.desc: Experiencing the beauty of a turquoise lagoon flanked by impressive, vegetation-covered, mountains.

programme.title: Karamea National Park: New Zealand
programme.desc: Quiet beaches, mysterious caves, and rainforested hills of this secluded haven.

programme.title: Seas of the World
programme.desc: Drift along rocky shores, idyllic beaches and hidden pockets of blue water in this ocean montage from around the globe.

programme.title: Spirit Lake Relaxation
programme.desc: Relax for 3 hours at the gorgeous Spirit Lake, in Mount St Helen's Washington with this soothing dynamic nature film containing only the pure sounds of Nature!

programme.title: Golden Waves Crashing at Sunset
programme.desc: The shores of the iconic Baker Beach in San Francisco with a sunset scene filmed in high definition. Views of the Marin headlands and the Golden Gate Bridge.

programme.title: Mystical River Relaxation
programme.desc: A one-hour compilation of river scenes from Japan's Azumino and Embara Rivers.

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: The relaxing vibe of a day at the beach, with a tour of the breathtaking coastlines near Auckland.

programme.title: Tarawera Lake & Taupo: New Zealand
programme.desc: Various nature scenery videos.

programme.title: Lakeside Campfire
programme.desc: The beauty of a lakeside campfire.

programme.title: Patagonia Mountain Stream
programme.desc: A rejuvenating, refreshing window to the glacial meltwater springs of Chile's Torres Del Paine National Park in Patagonia with this 1-hour long fixed-angle nature relaxation video complete with stereo nature sounds of the creek and birds chirping.

programme.title: Pororari River Track: New Zealand
programme.desc: Pororari River Track in New Zealand.

programme.title: The Soothing Sun

It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.desc: Starting the journey marveling at the cascading turquoise waters of Tumalog Falls, nestled amidst the lush forest and tropical foliage, and staying captivatingly thrilled by Aguinid Falls' multi-tiered rapids and unique rock formations.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Explore Spain, a country where sun-drenched beaches converge with vibrant cities steeped in centuries of history. From the artistic avenues of Barcelona to the lively Mediterranean ports, Spain presents a dynamic blend of culture, cuisine, and coastal traditions that embody its distinctive Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Makarska
programme.desc: In Makarska, where the Biokovo mountain meets the sea, we explored local flavors with chef Mario Tomaš. On the menu: "utisno" shark, a Venetian-influenced specialty, and njokada—a cinnamon-spiced twist on pašticada.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Memoirs July 24
programme.desc: Memoirs July 24

programme.title: Malini Angelica Montenegro
programme.desc: Malini explores Montenegro’s stunning landscapes, from the Bay of Kotor and its historic old town to the beaches of Sveti Stefan and Budva. Venturing inland to Skadar Lake and local wineries, she discovers the natural beauty, rich flavours, and warm hospitality of this rising Adriatic destination.

programme.title: Whats On Trade, Exhibitions and Unique Experiences
programme.desc: There is a unique energy that takes over the Mediterranean as the summer heat begins to build. This week, we are bypassing the usual tourist routes to find the heartbeat of the region through its most spectacular festivals. Imagine the sun setting over a lake in Tuscany as the Puccini Festival opens its 72nd season with the powerful melodies of Turandot. From that timeless elegance, we head straight into the high energy of Malta, where the Isle of MTV and the 10th anniversary of the Glitch Festival are turning the islands into a global hub for electronic music. We also explore the stunning heights of the Spanish Pyrenees for the floating stage at Pirineos Sur and hit the iconic cliffs of Santorini for the urban vibes of the Supa Dupa Fly Festival. This is a journey through a region that knows exactly how to celebrate its past while dancing firmly into the future.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Mediterranean Yoga Feel safe in your body
programme.desc: Mediterranean Yoga is a series that blends Embodiment Yoga with the peaceful beauty of the Mediterranean. Set in stunning coastal and natural locations, each episode encourages viewers to reconnect mind and body through gentle movement, breathwork, and mindfulness in a safe and calming space.

programme.title: Med Minds 02 Napoleon
programme.desc: Napoleon, the ambitious Corsican who rose to power, reshaped nations with his relentless drive and vision.

programme.title: Volcano Stories
programme.desc: Each of its tremors is constantly monitored : the Vesuvius is one of the world’s most famous and dangerous volcanoes. At its feet lies the city of Naples, the third largest city in Italy, and its 970,000 inhabitants.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Experiencing Madrid at its fun-loving best, we stare down a flamenco dancer, nibble pigs' ears, and ogle lavish palaces before side-tripping for some unforgettable history.

programme.title: Whats On Lights, Cinema, Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean screens its stories this week. Malta hosts the Mediterranean Film Festival, while Italy Venice Film Festival and Med Film Festival bring glamour and regional storytelling to iconic locations. France Cannes Film Festival shines globally, Spain International Fantastic Film Festival of Catalonia celebrates genre cinema, and Morocco Amazigh Film Festival showcases North African voices. Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine

A perfect mix of flavors and tradition.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Origini
programme.desc: Francesco Gasparri and Valentina Caruso explore Taranto, founded by Spartan settlers in 706 BC and soon a bustling Mediterranean hub. Gasparri traces the city’s history through the Aragonese castle, revealing remnants of ancient Taranto. Caruso visits the Archaeological Park of Egnatia, where the ancient Via Traiana, built by Emperor Trajan, still stands—a route once used by pilgrims to the Holy Land. Salento's traditions, including the Notte della Taranta dance, preserve the legacy of this rich past, as explained by prima ballerina Lucia Scarabina.

programme.title: The Odyssey on Odysseus Trail
programme.desc: Ten years after the sack of Troy, Zeus is alone on Olympus, with only his daughter Athena remaining at his side. She tries to convince her father to help Odysseus, the last Greek fighter who has not yet returned home to Ithaca.

programme.title: Concerto – OSN Gatti Bruckner Wagner Torino
programme.desc: In January 2022, Daniele Gatti conducted the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai at the Turin Auditorium, performing Wagner’s "Parsifal" excerpts and Bruckner’s Symphony No. 9. The programme highlighted Wagner's meditative Prelude to Act III and Good Friday Spell, followed by Bruckner’s profound Ninth Symphony, marked by its emotional depth and unfinished final movement.

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: Mediterranean Kitchen France
programme.desc: Chef Kurt invites Chef Geoffrey into the kitchen to cook a brilliant edible art show: delicate French pastries intricately designed to mimic Malta’s iconic architecture. programme.title: Into the Med: Malta an Island to Discover
programme.desc: Susannah takes you to the timeless magic of Malta’s former capital, Mdina, where centuries of history breathe within its ancient stone walls. She inhales the beautiful boulevards and rich cultural heritage of the city, as well as the fascinating underwater world of the Malta National Aquarium, learning about the diverse experiences that make the islands so special. Along the way, she discovers stunning views, incredible landmarks and stories that continue to shape Malta’s rich identity and indomitable spirit.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.desc: In Makarska, where the Biokovo mountain meets the sea, we explored local flavors with chef Mario Tomaš. On the menu: "utisno" shark, a Venetian-influenced specialty, and njokada—a cinnamon-spiced twist on pašticada.

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. She goes on a pintxo crawl, visits La Concha beach, nearby towns like Getaria and Zarautz for local specialties, experiences a traditional txoko, and ends with Semana Grande fireworks.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Italy's quintessential charms survive in its classic hill towns. From San Gimignano's medieval towers to Civita di Bagnoregio's cliff-hanging vistas, all sit on lofty stone perches that now protect them only from the modern world.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.title: MED Destination VENICE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Mediterranean Yoga Wake up your Body
programme.desc: Mediterranean Yoga is a series that blends Embodiment Yoga with the peaceful beauty of the Mediterranean. Set in stunning coastal and natural locations, each episode encourages viewers to reconnect mind and body through gentle movement, breathwork, and mindfulness in a safe and calming space.

programme.title: Memoirs July 26
programme.desc: Memoirs July 26

programme.title: Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The beats of the Mediterranean tell a story of culture, energy, and innovation. Malta’s Mużika Mużika celebrates local talent, Italy’s Nameless Festival electrifies the coast with indie and electronic sounds, Spain rocks out at Azkena Rock Festival, and Turkey swings with jazz at the Istanbul Caz Festival. Feel the pulse that moves the region.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Delve into wholesome flavors with a traditional chortopita, a savory pie filled with fresh greens and herbs, paired with a hearty chickpeas and spinach dish brightened with lemon and tomato for a satisfying, nutritious meal.

programme.title: Xplore Ireland
programme.desc: Relive the glories of Irish aristocracy as if no time has gone by, in the castles of Ireland. Relish the quaintness of laidback Irish towns.

programme.title: Bucket List
programme.desc: The name Sakurajima means cherry blossom island - and that is the beguiling name of a fuming volcano in Kyushu. Daniel Coll & Paddy Doherty try different ways to get up, close and personal with the volcano. What they don’t count on is an eruption.

programme.title: Costa Rica Calling
programme.desc: Venturing deep into Puntarenas, Genevieve seeks an adrenaline rush in the lush embrace of Monteverde.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alex is in Srinagar putting up on a houseboat. She explores the Dal lake, tries Kashmiri Tea, and ends her day with a traditional Kashmiri platter – Wazwan.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Alex is introduced to Tamil Nadu through the state capital, Chennai. A colonial-era cathedral that she visits turns out to be one of the only three known churches in the world built over the tomb of an apostle of Jesus. She also finds out that a museum dedicated to the life of a saint was once used by an American businessman to store ice. She soon realizes that the city is full of hidden stories waiting to be explored.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: Xplore Ireland
programme.desc: Lose yourself amidst the spectacular landscapes of Northern Ireland. Witness the miraculous resurfacing of Belfast.

programme.title: Bucket List
programme.desc: Daniel Coll & Paddy Doherty visit Meiji-Gura in Kyushu, Japan, to taste a locally brewed Japanese hard liquor, Shochu. They also go to the Makurazaki region for a special meal of bonito, a Japanese seafood delicacy, prepared for them by world-class chefs, Gaggan Anand and Takeshi “Goh” Fukuyama.

programme.title: Costa Rica Calling
programme.desc: Genevieve visits the charming town of Zarcero, where she chances upon the prized cheese of Costa Rica.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alexandra starts her journey from Tsomoriri where on the way she stops at Baralacha Pass. Later she visits Korzok village, interacts with locals and dresses up in a traditional Ladakhi attire.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: While the vast majority of Rajasthan’s inhabitants have always been staunch vegetarians, there has been tremendous popularity of the meat dishes in the state’s culinary culture. This came mainly from the Rajput rulers, which is why Alex meets Ajayraj Singh who comes from a royal lineage. He introduces her to the history of the valiant rulers of Mewar and some of the secret meat preparations of the kingdom

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: One of Uzbekistan’s most ancient cities, Bukhara was a popular town even during the days of the Silk Route trading. Built atop a constellation of small oases here weary desert travelers could find water and rest. Through its madrassahs, minarets, a massive royal fortress and the remnants of a once-vast market complex, Alex Outhwaite soaks in the vibes of the Central Asia of yore.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Bucket List
programme.desc: While the rest of Japan remained isolated from the world, Fukuoka’s global flavour was concocted by centuries of trade with its Asian neighbours. Adventurers, Daniel Coll and Paddy Doherty attend a unique baseball game at a rather offbeat stadium in Kyushu’s largest city.

programme.title: Costa Rica Calling
programme.desc: Guided by her love for coffee, Genevieve ventures into the heart of Heredia, a lush coffee-growing region.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alexandra explores the rugged region of Leh, visiting Thiksey Monastery, Leh Palace and Shanti Stupa. Later she sets out for a five hour drive to the picturesque Pangong Lake and stays in the tent.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Where many ancient Indian civilizations flourished in the most resource-filled areas, the people of Rajasthan created a powerful, complex, layered and regal culture and cuisine in the largely arid land that they called home. Alex discovers this when she meets Anjali Singh, a member of the royal family of Jaipur, who shows her how to make two prized recipes from her family’s legacy - Papad Ki Chutney and Safed Murg.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Frankfurt is the financial capital of the European Union. Kristina discovers that the city has much more to offer than just a good business meeting, as she learns about its history and architecture through its famous sights such as the Kaizerdom Cathedral and the Eltz Castle. She also goes to Rudesheim, where she encounters an amazing collection of data operated music instruments.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: Bucket List
programme.desc: Why do men camp in the great outdoors? Simply to get some peace and quiet. In this episode, watch Dan & Paddy’s day in Itoshima - a place with soothing waterfalls, fishing pools and perfect beach sunsets to calm the soul.

programme.title: Costa Rica Calling
programme.desc: Genevieve’s adventures in Costa Rica begin in the capital city, San Jose, where she checks off some Costa Rican rites of passage.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Bihar’s rural heartland has a lot to offer the intrepid traveller. Alex meets Rajesh Ramjan, a politician, a cultural conservationist and a foodie, who shows her the beauty of Bihar’s countryside and introduces her to some traditional Bihari dishes. From dahi-chura, the Bihari breakfast of champions to flavourful preparations of fresh local vegetables simmering on a traditional stove, Alex gets an understanding of the nourishing cuisine that fuels farmers to toil in the fields all day.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: Bucket List
programme.desc: Tea in Japan is a spiritual concept. Attaching ritual and ceremony to it, this country transforms the act of drinking tea to a moment of communion with the universe. Daniel Coll & Paddy Doherty find out different ways to relish Gyokuro tea, one of the highest grades of tea available in Japan. They also visit the village where it is grown.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: A 106 feet Buddha statue mesmerizes Alex as she explores Diskit Monastery in Nubra Valley. She tries the traditional ladakhi food and explores Leh city, by visiting Gurdwara Pathar Sahib and a school.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Frankfurt is the financial capital of the European Union. Kristina discovers that the city has much more to offer than just a good business meeting, as she learns about its history and architecture through its famous sights such as the Kaizerdom Cathedral and the Eltz Castle. She also goes to Rudesheim, where she encounters an amazing collection of data operated music instruments.

programme.title: Costa Rica Calling
programme.desc: In the heart of Costa Rica's countryside, Genevieve embarks on a journey of cultural immersion in Chilamate.

programme.title: Costa Rica Calling
programme.desc: In the heart of Costa Rica's countryside, Genevieve embarks on a journey of cultural immersion in Chilamate.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Pietro Muscari intervista Enrico Vaime, autore e conduttore radio e TV. Con Enrico si parla di radio, tv, libri, ma anche di amore e dispiaceri che hanno formato la sua carriera.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Pietro Muscari intervista la regista e sceneggiatrice Lina Wertmüller. Prima donna nella storia ad essere candidata all' Oscar come miglior regista, Lina racconta il suo rapporto con grandi personaggi del cinema come Lelio Luttazzi e Federico Fellini.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Sergio Furnari, e presenta un docuemntario su un suo ultimo lavoro aritistico "Covid Hero Monument"

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, passa una giornata a New York con il suo amico Geniale, il Maestro Antonio Ciacca, e tra una chiacchierata a Lincoln Center ed una passeggiata a Central Park, arrivano al prestigiosto Pier Hotel dove il Maestro Ciacca si esibisce regolarmente. in questo episodio di "MY TALENTED FRIENDS" scoprirete la storia di successo del Maestro Ciacca in un pccolo documentario MY JAZZ LIFE.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: BrindiamoS3
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Baluardo" dove incontra lo chef Marc Lanteri e la Sommelier Amy Belotti. Il Baluardo si trova a Mondoví una cittadina a circa 80 chilomentri da Torino. Con Chef Marc Lanteri Ornella prepara delle ricette tipiche del territorio e davanti ad un buon bicchiere di vino, Amy le racconta del successo del ristorante e la sua vita di americana in Italia. (2012)

programme.title: BrindiamoS3
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel cuore di New York e visita una pizzeria super chic dal nome PizzArte. Oltre a preparare delle fantastiche pizze, con il pizzaiolo appena arrivato dall' italia, Ornella e lo chef preparano anche alcuni piatti tradizionali campani.Ornella intervista il proprietario del ristorante, l'avvocato Bruno Cilio appassionato di cucina e di arte.(2013)

programme.title: BrindiamoS3
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più sofisticati di New York City, "SD26", la versione moderna del classico San Domenico. Oltre a preparare le ricette con lo chef Matteo Bergamini, intervista il famoso ristoratore Tony May e la figlia Marisa May parlando dei segreti del successo di questo nuovo ristorante: Tra gli ospiti di eccellenza, Ornella intervista Massimo Vignelli il talentuoso designer italiano conosciuto in tutto il mondo per la sua genialità. (2013)

programme.title: BrindiamoS3
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita Rolando Biamonte ad una delle sue pizzerie, Numero 28, dove oltre a preparare delle deliziose pizze, con la Signora Eugenia, la mamma di Rolando, Ornella prepara alcune ricette della sua amata terra calabrese. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita "Eataly", New York e con la chef Alicia Walter, prepara delle ricette con i prodotti tipici calabresi. Ornella incontra ed intervsita Dino Borri uno dei fondatori e proprietari di Eataly ed alcuni suoi amici calabresi che vivono e lavorano a New York.(2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Al Del Bello al suo ristorante "Il Portico", uno dei ristoranti più raffinati di Filadelfia. Al racconta la sua storia di gratidudine nei confronti della famiglia Lattanzi proprietari di ristoratori italiani a New York. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra chef Rocco Sacramone al ristorante Trattoria "l'Incontro", Chef Rocco, condivide alcune delle ricette più amate dai suoi clienti incluso una dolcissima pizza alla nutella. (2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra un vero gentiluomo della ristorazione italiana a Filadelfia, Giuseppe Giuliani, patron de "La Buca". Giuseppe oltre a preparare alcune ricette toscane, racconta l'avventura dell'apertura atipica e fuori programma del ristorante per ospitare il Maestro Luciano Pavarotti in tour a Filadelfia.(2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle pizzerie piu` autentiche di New York,con uno dei 5 forni a legna più antichi della città`. "Luzzo" Pizzeria si trova a due passi dal quartiere trendy, il Village. Con Michele Iuliano, pizzaiolo napoletano di grande esperienza, Ornella prepara delle deliziose pizze, alcune tradizionali come la classica margherita ed alcune con un twist. Ospite della puntata il giovane talento Italiano il tenore Luciamo La Monarca.(2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Ornella Fado è a Milano, all'EXPO, con i giovani della Basilicata del progetto Sano è Lucano. I prodotti tipici lucani ispirano una serie di incontri culinari: dalla barca alla Mondadori, fino a Lady Bu Bistrò e al ristorante stellato Il Luogo di Aimo e Nadia con lo chef Fabio Pisani.Il racconto è arricchito dagli interventi di Sara Farnetti e Pietro Bitonti.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.desc: Pietro Muscari intervista la regista e sceneggiatrice Lina Wertmüller. Prima donna nella storia ad essere candidata all' Oscar come miglior regista, Lina racconta il suo rapporto con grandi personaggi del cinema come Lelio Luttazzi e Federico Fellini.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Lincoln Square Steak House", a due passi da Lincoln Center. In questa puntata Ornella prepara alcune ricette con il Principe Emanule Filiberto di Savoia, gia` ospite dell'evento di Carnevale di alcuni giorni prima, lo chef Marcello Russodivito insegna al Principe come preprare una succulenta bistecca e prepara un piatto dedicato alla Regina Margherita. Questa puntata fa parte della stagione speciale "Brindiamo! International Cuisine". (2016)
